days.label: Push Day ? Chest, Shoulders & Triceps
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + arm circles + band pull-aparts

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 130 ? and we need to talk. You bumped yourself to 140 on sets 2 and 3 last week without earning it, and set 3 fell apart at 4 reps RPE 10. That's a self-inflicted wound. We go back to 130 for all 3 sets this week. Hit 10/10/10 at RPE 8 or under and you'll earn 135 next week the right way. Pause at chest, drive through heels, no improvised jumps.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 40 ? clean 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/7 last week. Top of the range and easy ? that earns the bump, normally. But you just ran a high-RPE bench session, so let's confirm the 40s feel solid for one more week before we stack more weight. Get 10/10/10 at RPE 7 again and next week we go to 45. 30-degree incline, control the negative.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 ? 10/9/8 at RPE 7/9/9 last week. You hit the top on set 1 but sets 2 and 3 dropped off and got hard. Not there yet. Get all 3 sets to 10 reps at RPE 8 or under to earn 35. Brace your core, don't lean back, full lockout overhead.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Staying at 10 ? 12/12/12 at RPE 7/7/7, same as the week before. Weight's not moving yet, but we're adding a 2-second hold at the top of every rep this week. That's your progression. Slight bend in the elbows, lead with the elbows not the hands, slow and controlled.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 100 ? 10/10/8 at RPE 7/7/8 last week. Set 3 dropped to 8 reps but RPE was only 8, so you were in range and not cooked ? just fatigued from the bench chaos earlier. Clean up the bench and your triceps should have more in the tank here. Hit 10/10/10 to earn 105. Hands shoulder-width, elbows tucked tight, full lockout.

exercises.name: Dips
exercises.notes: NEW ROTATION ? swapping in dips this week for the tricep rope pushdown (which you hit 12/12/9 at RPE 7/7/9 ? good start but let's give it a rest). Use the dip bars, stay upright (not leaning forward) to keep it tricep-focused. Bodyweight for now. Pick a rep count you can hit for 3 sets at RPE 7-8. If bodyweight is too easy, note it and we'll add a dumbbell between your legs next week.

days.cooldown: Stretch chest, shoulders, and triceps ? 5 min

days.label: Pull Day ? Back, Biceps & Rear Delts
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + band pull-aparts + cat-cow stretches

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlift
exercises.notes: Staying at 195 ? 8/9/8 at RPE 8/8/8 last week. You pushed into the 9-rep zone on set 2, which is progress, but you need to get all 3 sets into the 9-10 range to earn the jump to 205. You're close. Brace hard off the floor, pull through the heels, controlled descent. Don't rush the setup.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Single-Arm Row
exercises.notes: UP 5 lb to 50 ? 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/7 last week. That's the cleanest possible signal to move up. Earn it. Each side, pull to the hip, squeeze at the top for a full second, slow the negative. Don't let form slide just because the weight went up.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Staying at 100 ? 10/10/10 at RPE 7/8/8 last week. Top of the range but RPE climbed to 8 on sets 2 and 3. Get all 3 sets at RPE 7 to earn 110. Wide grip on the lat bar, pull to upper chest, squeeze the lats, no leaning back into a row.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
exercises.notes: NEW ROTATION ? rotating in cable face pulls this week after reverse flyes last week (15/15/15 at RPE 7/7/7 ? great debut, we'll bring those back). Rope attachment at upper pulley, pull to your face, elbows high, finish with external rotation at the end. Light weight ? this is a shoulder health exercise as much as a rear-delt exercise. Hit 12-15 at RPE 7.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Staying at 65 ? 10/10/9 at RPE 7/8/9 last week. Set 3 fell a rep short and hit RPE 9. You're in the range but not clean enough to move up. Hit 10/10/10 with RPE staying at 8 or under on all sets and we go to 70. Strict form, no swinging, full squeeze at the top.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 ? 10/10/10 at RPE 8/8/8 last week. In range but not at the top, and RPE is right at the edge. Hit 12/12/12 at RPE 8 or under to earn 35. Neutral grip, control the negative, no swinging the 30s up.

days.cooldown: Stretch lats, biceps, and upper back ? 5 min

days.label: Leg Day ? Quads, Hamstrings, Glutes & Core
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + bodyweight squats + leg swings

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.notes: Staying at 165 ? 8/8/8 at RPE 7/7/8 last week. Solid ? you actually showed up and logged it, which is the first thing. But you hit the bottom of the rep range across the board. Push for 9-10 reps this week, keep RPE at 8 or under, and we bump to 175. Below parallel, brace your core, drive through the heels.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: UP 10 lb to 145 ? 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/7 last week. That's a clean sweep, bump earned. Slight knee bend, push the hips back, feel the hamstring stretch, bar close to the shins on the way down. The jump from 135 to 145 is bigger than usual ? settle in and aim for 8-10 at RPE 7-8.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 ? 10/12/10 last week. You hit 12 on set 2 but sets 1 and 3 stayed at 10. Inconsistent. Get all 3 sets to 12 clean reps per side to earn 35. Rear foot on the bench, drop straight down, drive through the front heel.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: UP 10 lb to 65 ? 12/12/12 at RPE 7/7/7 last week. You called the shot on this one ? perfect execution earns the bump. Upper back on the bench, drive through the heels, full hip extension, squeeze the glutes hard at the top. Hold the squeeze for a full second.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: NEW ROTATION ? swapping out leg curl this week (you started at 70 lbs which was way too heavy ? 8/9/6 at RPE 9/9/9 across the board, drop that weight significantly when it rotates back in). Leg extension balances things out with some direct quad isolation after all the hinging. Use the leg attachment. Squeeze the quads hard at the top, controlled negative. Pick a weight you can hit 12-15 at RPE 7-8.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.notes: Staying with dead bug ? 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/7 bodyweight last week. Bodyweight was easy, so this week: hold a 5-10 lb dumbbell behind your head as you extend. 3 sec out, 3 sec back, opposite arm and leg. Lower back stays glued to the floor the entire time.

days.cooldown: Stretch quads, hamstrings, hip flexors ? 5 min
